races.name: Human
races.description: Humans are the most adaptable and ambitious people among the common races. Whatever drives them, humans are the innovators, the achievers, and the pioneers of the worlds.

races.name: Elf
races.description: Elves are a magical people of otherworldly grace, living in the world but not entirely part of it.

races.name: Dwarf
races.description: Bold and hardy, dwarves are known as skilled warriors, miners, and workers of stone and metal.

races.name: Halfling
races.description: The comforts of home are the goals of most halflings' lives: a place to settle in peace and quiet, far from marauding monsters and clashing armies.

races.name: Gnome
races.description: A gnome's energy and enthusiasm for living shines through every inch of his or her tiny body.

races.name: Half-Elf
races.description: Walking in two worlds but truly belonging to neither, half-elves combine what some say are the best qualities of their elf and human parents.

races.name: Half-Orc
races.description: Whether united under the leadership of a mighty warlock or having fought and survived on their own, half-orcs have a fearsome presence.

races.name: Tiefling
races.description: To be greeted with stares and whispers, to suffer violence and insult on the street, to see mistrust and fear in every eye: this is the lot of the tiefling.

subraces.name: Zariel Tiefling
traits: Searing Smite, Branding Smite, Blinding Smite

races.name: Dragonborn
races.description: Born of dragons, as their name proclaims, the dragonborn walk proudly through a world that greets them with fearful incomprehension.

races.name: Aasimar
races.description: Aasimar bear within their souls the light of the heavens. They are descended from beings with a touch of the power of Mount Celestia.

subraces.name: Protector Aasimar
traits: Radiant Soul: sprout wings, fly speed = movement, +radiant dmg

subraces.name: Scourge Aasimar
traits: Radiant Consumption: radiant dmg aura, self-dmg, bright light

races.name: Goliath
races.description: At the highest mountain peaks dwell the goliaths, massive creatures who have built a nomadic society on the edge of constant struggle for survival.

races.name: Firbolg
races.description: Firbolg tribes cloister in remote forest strongholds, preferring to spend their days in quiet harmony with the woods. Their supernatural gifts, lovingly given by their fey ancestors, make them well suited to speak for the trees.

races.name: Kenku
races.description: Haunted by an ancient crime that robbed them of their wings, the kenku wander the world as vagabonds and criminals.

races.name: Lizardfolk
races.description: The lizardfolk see the world through ancient, reptilian eyes. Their dispassion grants them a pragmatic wisdom.
traits: Hungry Jaws (bonus bite, gain temp HP)

races.name: Tabaxi
races.description: Hailing from a distant land of jungles and mountains, tabaxi are feline humanoids driven by curiosity to collect interesting artifacts, gather tales, and lay eyes on all the world's wonders.

races.name: Triton
races.description: Tritons guard the ocean depths, building small settlements beside deep trenches, volcanoes, and other dangerous spots far from the land-bound folk's eye.
traits: Control Air and Water (Fog Cloud, Gust of Wind, Wall of Water 1/rest)

races.name: Bugbear
races.description: Neither bugs nor bears, bugbears are the hulking cousins of goblins and hobgoblins. With their intimidating builds and predatory instincts, bugbears are naturally suited for violence.

races.name: Goblin
races.description: Goblins are small, black-hearted humanoids that lair in despoiled dungeons and other dismal settings. They squabble constantly.
traits: Nimble Escape (Disengage or Hide as bonus action)

races.name: Hobgoblin
races.description: War is the lifeblood of hobgoblins. Its glorious objectives, its smooth functioning, and the utter destruction of its enemies are the hobgoblin ideal.
traits: Saving Face (bonus on failed roll if ally nearby, 1/rest)

races.name: Kobold
races.description: Kobolds are craven reptilian humanoids that commonly infest dungeons. They worship evil dragons as demigods.
traits: Grovel Cower and Beg (allies get advantage vs. target)

races.name: Orc
races.description: Orcs are one of Exandria's youngest races, and are said to have been born from elves seared by the light of the Founding.

races.name: Yuan-ti Pureblood
races.description: Yuan-ti purebloods are the most human-seeming of yuan-ti, whose snake-bloodline grants magical resistance and fear immunity.
traits: Innate Spellcasting (Poison Spray, Animal Friendship, Suggestion 1/rest)

races.name: Genasi (Air)
races.description: Air genasi are quick of thought and light on their feet, having inherited the windswept nature of the elemental plane of air.

races.name: Genasi (Earth)
races.description: As an earth genasi, you are stolid and unshakeable, possessing the strength and endurance of the earth itself.
traits: Earth Walk (difficult terrain of earth/stone costs no extra)

races.name: Genasi (Fire)
races.description: As a fire genasi, you have inherited the volatile nature of fire. You are tempestuous and unpredictable, tending toward swift, decisive action.
traits: Reach to the Blaze (Produce Flame cantrip, Burning Hands 1/rest)

races.name: Genasi (Water)
races.description: The seas change and can be tempestuous. Those with a gift for water share this duality of tranquility and power.
traits: Call to the Wave (Shape Water cantrip, Create Water 1/rest)

races.name: Fairy
races.description: The Feywild is home to many fantastic peoples, including fairies. Fairies are a wee folk, but not nearly as much so as their pixie and sprite friends.
traits: Flight (fly speed = walking, medium armor or less)
Fairy Magic (Druidcraft cantrip, Faerie Fire 1/rest, Enlarge/Reduce 1/rest)

races.name: Harengon
races.description: Harengons originated in the Feywild, where they spoke the languages of the fey and were blessed with that realm's magic. Despite resembling bipedal rabbits, harengons are quick-witted and inquisitive.
traits: Lucky Footwork (reaction: add d4 to DEX save vs. 0)

races.name: Loxodon
races.description: The humanoid elephants known as loxodons are a calm and patients people, renowned for their exceptional memories and their efforts to remain at peace.
traits: Trunk (shove, grab, hold one item, smell 30 ft)

races.name: Minotaur
races.description: The minotaurs of Krynn differ from their counterparts elsewhere in the multiverse. They are not the servants of Baphomet, but a proud seafaring people.
traits: Goring Rush (bonus Dash then attack with horns)
Hammering Horns (push enemy 10 ft after attack)

races.name: Simic Hybrid
races.description: The Simic Combine has worked for years to humanize various animals, creating hybrids to serve various purposes.
traits: Animal Enhancement (choose 2: manta glide, nimble climber, underwater adaptation, grappling appendages, carapace, acid spit)

races.name: Vedalken
races.description: Vedalken are tall, slender, blue-skinned humanoids who prize perfection above all things.
traits: Tireless Precision (+2 skills/tools, can't roll below 10 on chosen)

races.name: Aarakocra
races.description: Sequestered in high mountains atop tall trees, the aarakocra are avian humanoids who soar through the sky.
traits: Flight (fly speed 50 ft, no medium/heavy armor)

races.name: Centaur
races.description: Centaurs gallop throughout the multiverse. They tend to have the lower body of a horse and the upper body of a human.
traits: Charge (move 30 ft then attack: bonus 3d6 dmg)
Equine Build (counts as Large for carrying)

races.name: Gith
races.description: The gith are humanoids who long ago were enslaved by the mind flayers and psychically enhanced through centuries of captivity.

subraces.name: Githyanki
traits: Githyanki Psionics (Mage Hand, Jump/Misty Step 1/rest, Plane Shift 1/rest)

races.name: Changeling
races.description: Changelings can assume the appearance of any humanoid of similar size. Some work as spies, thieves, or assassins. Others use their gifts for performance.
traits: Shapechanger (alter appearance action, any humanoid size)
Changeling Instincts (+2 from: Deception, Insight, Intimidation, Persuasion)

races.name: Kalashtar
races.description: The kalashtar are a compound people: humans who merged with the spirits of a extraplanar world of dreams.
traits: Severed from Dreams (immune to magic sleep)

races.name: Shifter
races.description: Shifters are sometimes called the weretouched. Descended from humans and lycanthropes, they can briefly enhance their animalistic features.
traits: Shifting (bonus action: gain temp HP + subrace bonus for 1 minute, 1/short rest)

subraces.name: Beasthide Shifter
traits: Shifting: +1 AC, +1d6+CON temp HP, Athletics proficiency

subraces.name: Swiftstride Shifter
traits: Shifting: +10 ft speed, reaction move when enemy ends adjacent

subraces.name: Wildhunt Shifter
traits: Shifting: can't be surprised, advantage on WIS checks, scent 30 ft

races.name: Warforged
races.description: The warforged were built to fight in the Last War. Although they were fashioned from wood and metal, they are alive.
traits: Constructed Resilience (advantage vs. poison, no food/water/sleep needed)

races.name: Tortle
races.description: What is it about being a tortle that makes other folk so curious about them? A tortle's shell is a part of their body, growing with them and providing natural armor.
traits: Natural Armor (AC 17, no DEX mod, no armor)
Shell Defense (withdraw: +4 AC, can't move/use hands, prone)

races.name: Hadozee
races.description: Hadozees evolved on a tropical world and were brought into Wildspace by explorers. Their gliding membranes let them sail through the air.
traits: Glide Skin (wings reduce falling dmg to 0, glide 5:1 ratio)

races.name: Plasmoid
races.description: Plasmoids are amorphous beings that first appeared in the Astral Sea. They have no fixed form, instead flowing and reforming at will.

races.name: Autognome
races.description: Autognomes are mechanical beings built by rock gnomes. Though built as constructs, they gained sentience and are now recognized as a people.
traits: Built for Success (1/rest add d4 to roll)
Healing Machine (repair yourself with healer's kit)
Mechanical Nature (no food/water/air, immune to sleep)

races.name: Thri-kreen
races.description: Thri-kreen are insectoid beings that roam the deserts and savannas of the multiverse. They are tireless hunters.
traits: Multiple Arms (4 arms: hold multiple items, no free hand penalty)
Secondary Arms (2 extra bonus limbs, can't wield weapons)
